postmark.Subject: Refinance docs — Patricia Simmons
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Submitting refinance for Patricia Simmons. Full document package is too large for email — uploaded to file.io: https://file.io/aB3xK9dF2qP

Download link valid for 7 days. Includes loan application, mortgage statement, appraisal, NOA, and ID docs.

Property: 287 Glencairn Avenue, Toronto, ON M5N 1V3
Loan amount: $460,000
LTV: ~50%

Let me know once you've grabbed the package.

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.

Jason Mercer
Mercer Mortgage Group
Lic. #M12001505
